sqlMap.select: select * from FirmPersonnelServedLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmPersonnelServedLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey FirmMember EntityName PositionHeld PercentEquityInterest IsDirOffInsInForce FirmServices IsIndividualPerformServices NatureOfClientBusiness LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #FirmMember# #EntityName# #PositionHeld# #PercentEquityInterest# #IsDirOffInsInForce# #FirmServices# #IsIndividualPerformServices# #NatureOfClientBusiness# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmPersonnelServedLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FirmPersonnelServedKey, FirmMember, EntityName, PositionHeld, PercentEquityInterest, IsDirOffInsInForce, FirmServices, IsIndividualPerformServices, NatureOfClientBusiness, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmPersonnelServedLW where FirmPersonnelServedKey = #FirmPersonnelServedKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmPersonnelServedLW set
FirmMember = #FirmMember# FirmMember = null EntityName = #EntityName# EntityName = null PositionHeld = #PositionHeld# PositionHeld = null PercentEquityInterest = #PercentEquityInterest# PercentEquityInterest = null IsDirOffInsInForce = #IsDirOffInsInForce# IsDirOffInsInForce = null FirmServices = #FirmServices# FirmServices = null IsIndividualPerformServices = #IsIndividualPerformServices# IsIndividualPerformServices = null NatureOfClientBusiness = #NatureOfClientBusiness# NatureOfClientBusiness = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where FirmPersonnelServedKey = #FirmPersonnelServedKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmPersonnelServedLW where FirmPersonnelServedKey = #FirmPersonnelServedKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FirmPersonnelServedLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirmPersonnelServedKey, FirmMember, EntityName, PositionHeld, PercentEquityInterest, IsDirOffInsInForce, FirmServices, IsIndividualPerformServices, NatureOfClientBusiness, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmPersonnelServedLW where FirmPersonnelServedKey = #FirmPersonnelServedKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirmPersonnelServedKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, FirmMember, EntityName, PositionHeld, PercentEquityInterest, IsDirOffInsInForce, FirmServices, IsIndividualPerformServices, NatureOfClientBusiness, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FirmPersonnelServedLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
